testcase.name: tests.test_integration
testcase.error:
app\shared\utils\rabbitmq_publisher.py:68: in _setup_pool conn = pika.BlockingConnection( venv\Lib\site-packages\pika\adapters\blocking_connection.py:360: in __init__ self._impl = self._create_connection(parameters, _impl_class) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venv\Lib\site-packages\pika\adapters\blocking_connection.py:451: in _create_connection raise self._reap_last_connection_workflow_error(error) E pika.exceptions.AMQPConnectionError
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests\test_integration.py:10: in <module> from app.modules.ingestion.application.rss_collector import collect_and_publish app\modules\ingestion\application\rss_collector.py:47: in <module> publisher = RabbitMQPublisher( app\shared\utils\rabbitmq_publisher.py:57: in __init__ self._setup_pool() app\shared\utils\rabbitmq_publisher.py:82: in _setup_pool self.logger.warning( ^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'RabbitMQPublisher' object has no attribute 'logger'
